home.subtitle: Stop drowning in spreadsheets. Get an instant budget estimate, connect with trusted suppliers, and manage every detail from one beautiful dashboard.
home.note: No credit card required · Free forever for couples
home.features_title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
home.features_subtitle: A modern platform built specifically for today's couples who value efficiency, transparency, and beauty.
home.feature1_desc: Answer a few simple questions and receive a detailed, itemised cost estimate instantly.
home.feature2_desc: Access pre-vetted venues, caterers, florists, and entertainment all in one place.
home.feature3_desc: Guest lists, seating charts, day-of timeline, shared photo albums — everything you need.
home.feature4_desc: Your data stays yours. We never sell personal information to third parties.
home.step1_desc: Share your location, guest count, and dream style preferences.
home.step2_desc: See a full cost breakdown and supplier recommendations in seconds.
home.step3_desc: Use your private dashboard to manage every detail from RSVP to seating.
home.banner_subtitle: Join hundreds of couples who planned their perfect day with One Minute Event.

calculator.title: Let's plan your perfect wedding
